Interface IVersionEventsServices

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to events that occur on versions in services. This interface is for use in Server and especially Server Object Extensions.

[Guid("8756A48E-DF2B-4AC9-8547-AEDB8B0C999B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IVersionEventsServices
